stories.title: Warriors Win 2026 NBA Summer League Championship

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
WARRIORS WIN THE 2026 SUMMER LEAGUE CHAMPIONSHIP.

Down 12 in the 4th. Didn't matter.

Golden State rallied to beat Memphis 94-90. Yaxel Lendeborg: 21 pts, 10 reb, MVP.

The Warriors are BACK.

#Warriors #NBAFreeAgency

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Yaxel Lendeborg was drafted No. 11.

He just won Summer League MVP.

21 points. 10 rebounds. 23 minutes. Championship comeback from 12 down.

The Warriors don't make mistakes in the first round.

#Warriors #SummerLeague

article.headline: Warriors Rally From 12 Down to Win 2026 NBA Summer League Championship

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Warriors Win 2026 NBA Summer League Championship

**Type:** imagn
**Search Term:** "Yaxel Lendeborg Golden State Warriors"

**Notes:** Championship game action or trophy celebration. MVP moment preferred.

#### Image Concept 1B — Article Hero (1200x630)

---

research.facts:
Warriors Win 2026 NBA Summer League Championship
**Source 1:** ESPN box score — Warriors 94, Grizzlies 90 (July 19, 9 PM ET)
- Warriors rallied from 12-point fourth-quarter deficit
- Yaxel Lendeborg: 21 pts, 10 reb, 2 ast, 2 stl in 23 minutes — Championship Game MVP
- Deivon Smith (off bench): 21 pts on 9-for-14 shooting
- Cedric Coward (Grizzlies): 19 pts
- Cameron Boozer (Grizzlies): 19 pts
**Source 2:** NBA.com championship recap — confirmed final score and Lendeborg MVP
**Source 3:** Yahoo Sports — confirmed rally from 12 down
**Confidence:** HIGH on all facts (ESPN, NBA.com, Yahoo Sports all agree)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LeBron James at Fanatics Fest this weekend:

"I won't hold you guys up too much longer."

The NBA hasn't released the 2026-27 SCHEDULE yet because of his decision.

Heat. Cavs. Warriors. 76ers. One will change the league.

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Think about what Miami already has:

Giannis Antetokounmpo. Just got there.

Now LeBron James is days away from a decision — and Miami is one of his final four.

LeBron + Giannis in South Beach would be historic.

#Heat #LeBronJames

article.headline: LeBron James Says Decision Is Coming Soon. The NBA Is Listening.

research.facts:
LeBron James Free Agency — Decision Imminent
**Source 1:** ESPN/Shams Charania — LeBron "getting closer and closer to making a decision"
**Source 2:** Yahoo Sports — LeBron said at Fanatics Fest: "I won't hold you guys up too much longer"
**Source 3:** CBS Sports — four teams linked: Cavaliers, Heat, Warriors, 76ers
**Source 4:** ESPN — Commissioner Silver confirmed NBA has NOT released 2026-27 schedule; directly tied to LeBron's decision
**Source 5:** Bleacher Report — LeBron's priorities: championship contention, team culture, leadership role
**Key verified facts:**
- LeBron has informed the Lakers he will NOT return (HIGH confidence)
- No announcement as of July 20 morning (HIGH confidence)
- Final four: Heat, Cavaliers, Warriors, 76ers (HIGH confidence)
- Decision expected within days (MEDIUM — Shams single source)

stories.title: Kawhi Investigation — Silver Says It Must End Before Next Season

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Kawhi Leonard investigation is now 11 months old.

Adam Silver: it "needs to be wrapped up before next season."

The probe just expanded to a SECOND undisclosed endorsement deal.

Raptors still can't plan their roster.

#Raptors #NBA

article.headline: Silver Says Kawhi Investigation Must End Before Next Season. It Has Been Running 11 Months.

research.facts:
Kawhi Leonard Investigation
**Source 1:** ESPN — investigation at 11 months, run by Wachtell Lipton law firm
**Source 2:** NBC Sports — expanded to second previously undisclosed endorsement deal + personal expenses
**Source 3:** Yahoo Sports — Silver quote: "needs to be wrapped up before next season"
**Source 4:** SI — Clippers-Raptors trade officially on hold
**Source 5:** CBS Sports — Clippers deny wrongdoing, cite Aspiration/Sanberg fraud
**Original deal:** Kawhi to Toronto for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, unprotected 2031/2033 first-round picks, 2027 pick swap, two second-round picks
**Confidence:** HIGH on all facts (multiple major outlets confirm)

stories.title: Heat's New Reality — Giannis Already There, LeBron Could Follow

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Miami gave up Tyler Herro, three unprotected first-round picks, and their best young players to get Giannis.

That's how committed the Heat are to building a superteam.

LeBron's decision just got even more interesting.

#Heat #Giannis #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: Giannis Is Already There. LeBron's Decision Could Make Miami Unstoppable.

research.facts:
Heat Superteam — Giannis Already There
**Source 1:** NBA.com — Giannis trade confirmed: Miami gets Giannis + Portis; Bucks get Herro, Kel'el Ware, Jaime Jaquez Jr., Kasparas Jakučionis, picks (2031 unprotected, 2033 unprotected, No. 13, 2030 swap, 2033 2nd)
**Source 2:** NBC Miami — confirmed trade night before 2026 NBA Draft
**Source 3:** ESPN — Giannis: 13 years in Milwaukee, 10 All-Stars, 2 MVPs, 2021 NBA title/Finals MVP
**Source 4:** CBS Sports — LeBron + Giannis would be Miami's most loaded roster since 2010-11 Big Three
**Confidence:** HIGH on trade details (multiple confirmed sources)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Cedric Coward's 2026 Summer League:

→ 28 pts, 6 reb, 5 ast in the semifinal
→ 19 pts in the championship game
→ 14.7 ppg average across Vegas

The Grizzlies already knew he was good. Vegas just confirmed it.

#Grizzlies #SummerLeague

article.headline: Cedric Coward's Summer League: 28 Points in the Semis, 19 in the Final, and a Statement Made

research.facts:
Cedric Coward Summer League
**Source 1:** Spokesman-Review — Coward regular season: 13.6 ppg, 5.8 reb, 2.8 ast; started 47 of 62 games
**Source 2:** ESPN box score — Coward: 19 pts in championship game loss
**Source 3:** Yahoo Sports (semifinal recap) — Coward: 28 pts, 6 reb, 5 ast, 4 three-pointers, 9-for-19 FG vs. Rockets
**Source 4:** Spokesman-Review — double-double game (17 pts, 12 reb, 4 ast, 1 blk, 1 stl) earlier in SL
**Source 5:** ClutchPoints — Coward on Boozer: "He's special"
**Confidence:** HIGH on all performance facts
